title: Freelance Data Annotator
description: Join our global team to help train the world's most advanced AI models. You will be responsible for high-precision labeling across various data types.
responsibilities: Annotate and label various types of data (image, video, text) according to project guidelines.
Review annotated data for accuracy and completeness.
Work collaboratively with data scientists to ensure high-quality output.
Maintain detailed records of changes made during the process.
Adhere to strict project deadlines and timelines.
requirements: 0-2 Years experience as a data annotator.
Proficiency in tools like Supervisely, CVAT, etc.
Strong attention to detail and quality standards.
Knowledge of bounding boxes, segmentation, and keypoint labeling.
Reliable internet connection and hardware.

title: Operations & Admin Coordinator
description: We are looking for an organized Admin Coordinator to manage our freelancer workforce, handle project scheduling, and oversee administrative operations.
responsibilities: Manage freelancer onboarding and documentation processes.
Track project progress and coordinate between teams.
Handle administrative reporting and incentive tracking.
Oversee day-to-day office operations and virtual collaboration tools.
Assist in recruitment and quality control processes.
requirements: Proven experience in administration or operations coordination.
Expertise in Google Workspace (especially Sheets/Excel).
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Ability to manage multiple project streams simultaneously.
Strong organizational and problem-solving skills.

title: AI Content Quality Lead
description: Ensure the highest standards of data accuracy for LLM training. You will lead a team of annotators and define quality benchmarks for complex NLP projects.
responsibilities: Develop and refine annotation guidelines for NLP and generative AI projects.
Conduct regular quality audits and provide feedback to the annotation team.
Analyze error patterns and implement training modules to reduce edge-case failures.
Coordinate with client-side AI researchers to align on data quality expectations.
Build automated quality check workflows for large-scale datasets.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Linguistics, Computer Science, or related field.
3+ years experience in data quality or AI training data management.
Deep understanding of RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) workflows.
Exceptional analytical skills and attention to linguistic nuances.
Strong leadership and team management experience.

title: Full Stack Developer (Internal Tools)
description: Build and maintain the proprietary workforce management and annotation software that powers our global data operations.
responsibilities: Develop scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Build custom annotation interfaces for niche data labeling requirements.
Optimize backend performance to handle thousands of concurrent freelancer sessions.
Integrate AI-assisted pre-labeling tools into our core annotation pipeline.
Maintain enterprise-grade security for client data hosted on our platforms.
requirements: 2+ years experience in Full Stack Development (MERN stack preferred).
Strong command over JavaScript/TypeScript and modern UI frameworks.
Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure) and Docker.
Passion for building tools that improve human-AI collaboration.
Ability to work in an agile, fast-paced environment.

title: Project Manager - Computer Vision
description: Drive end-to-end execution of large-scale Computer Vision projects, from initial pilot to final delivery for global automotive and robotics clients.
responsibilities: Define project scope, timelines, and resource allocation for CV projects.
Liaise with clients to understand technical requirements and edge cases.
Monitor project health, burn rates, and delivery quality in real-time.
Managing risk by identifying potential bottlenecks in the data pipeline.
Prepare technical delivery reports and participate in QBRs with clients.
requirements: Proven PM experience in the AI/ML data annotation industry.
Basic understanding of Computer Vision concepts (Object Detection, Segmentation).
Proficiency in PM tools like JIRA, Asana, and Slack.
Excellent client-facing communication and presentation skills.
PMP or Agile certification is a plus.

title: Community Engagement Specialist
description: Grow and nurture our vibrant community of freelance contributors. You will be the voice of LabelzAI across social platforms and contributor forums.
responsibilities: Moderate and engage with the contributor community on Telegram/Discord.
Create engaging content highlighting contributor success stories.
Organize webinars and virtual meetups for freelancers.
Gather contributor feedback to improve the freelancer experience.
Support the recruitment team by building brand awareness among potential candidates.
requirements: Excellent social media management and communication skills.
Experience in community building or social marketing.
Friendly, proactive personality with high emotional intelligence.
Ability to create simple graphics and written content.
Interest in the AI industry and freelance work trends.
